title: brachyglottis × remotifolia
intro: Brachyglottis × remotifolia, also known as 'Sunshine', is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Brachyglottis grayi and Brachyglottis compacta. This plant is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachyglottis × remotifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Brachyglottis × remotifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
